headline: How a 73-Year-Old Built a Monthly Paycheck Around O, MAIN, and SPYI
summary: Most 73-year-olds don’t want to babysit twelve positions in retirement. The reader behind this headline has roughly $750,000 in a brokerage account, collects Social Security, and wants the rest of the income to land in the bank account at predictable monthly intervals to match utility bills, property tax, and groceries. Two monthly-pay anchors do most ... How a 73-Year-Old Built a Monthly Paycheck Around O, MAIN, and SPYI

headline: 2 Stable REITs for Growth, Even in High-Inflation Periods
summary: For investors looking for income, Gladstone Land and Realty Income provide stability along with dividend yields above 5%.
